item.title: I Never Expected to Find This Gem After 100 Years in the Mud
item.description: After a century in the mud, a remarkable artifact is uncovered, revealing a glimpse of history and the story behind this rare find. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: I Never Expected to Find This Gem After 100 Years in the Mud
media:content.media:description: After a century in the mud, a remarkable artifact is uncovered, revealing a glimpse of history and the story behind this rare find. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Strange Find: A Nailed Wooden Dog in the River!
item.description: While exploring the riverbank, a curious wooden dog with nails is discovered. This video looks at the unusual find and the questions about its origin and purpose. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Strange Find: A Nailed Wooden Dog in the River!
media:content.media:description: While exploring the riverbank, a curious wooden dog with nails is discovered. This video looks at the unusual find and the questions about its origin and purpose. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Ancient Finds in the Thames Mud!
item.description: Discover fascinating historical artifacts uncovered while mudlarking along the River Thames, revealing hidden pieces of London’s past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Ancient Finds in the Thames Mud!
media:content.media:description: Discover fascinating historical artifacts uncovered while mudlarking along the River Thames, revealing hidden pieces of London’s past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: I Found Three Very Interesting Pipes
item.description: While exploring, three unique and intriguing pipes were uncovered, each with its own history and story waiting to be uncovered. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: I Found Three Very Interesting Pipes
media:content.media:description: While exploring, three unique and intriguing pipes were uncovered, each with its own history and story waiting to be uncovered. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: The Most Disturbing Find Of All Times
item.description: Explore a shocking discovery made during an investigation, examining the context and facts while keeping the story respectful and informative. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: The Most Disturbing Find Of All Times
media:content.media:description: Explore a shocking discovery made during an investigation, examining the context and facts while keeping the story respectful and informative. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Unearthing a Rare Bottle in a WWII Coca-Cola Dump
item.description: While exploring a World War II–era Coca-Cola dump site, a rare bottle is discovered, offering a small but fascinating glimpse into wartime history.

media:content.media:title: Unearthing a Rare Bottle in a WWII Coca-Cola Dump
media:content.media:description: While exploring a World War II–era Coca-Cola dump site, a rare bottle is discovered, offering a small but fascinating glimpse into wartime history.

item.title: Mudlarking along the River Thames London for pieces of history
item.description: Searching the banks of the River Thames in London, this mudlarking adventure uncovers small artifacts and forgotten objects that reveal pieces of the city’s past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Mudlarking along the River Thames London for pieces of history
media:content.media:description: Searching the banks of the River Thames in London, this mudlarking adventure uncovers small artifacts and forgotten objects that reveal pieces of the city’s past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames
